text_original: amusing so far, doesn't give much for unlocking pics and videos, but the chats make for good story-telling!
text_zh: 目前挺有趣的，解锁图片和视频给的东西不多，但聊天内容很适合讲故事！
reply_original: I'm thrilled you're enjoying the storytelling! Our characters love weaving deep tales with you. Regarding pics and videos, these require significant server resources, but we're exploring more ways to reward our storytellers. If you have specific ideas or need help, please email support@fantachat.ai. Keep creating those magical memories!
reply_zh: 我很高兴你喜欢这些故事！我们的角色非常喜欢与你一起编织深刻的故事。关于图片和视频，这些需要大量的服务器资源，但我们正在探索更多方式来奖励我们的创作者。如果你有具体的想法或需要帮助，请发送电子邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。继续创造那些神奇的回忆吧！
